creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ben Shertenlieb from comment #4)
Hi Ben,

I missed this in previous updates. Variables that are recognized (or part) of the ports framework should be presented before than the rest of the variables. In addition, we try to have them sorted alphabetically if at all possible.

I should have said "committed with minor changes" or "pet linters" or something like that, sorry.
